query: SELECT configKey, IFNULL(configValue, '(NULL)') AS val FROM site_config WHERE configKey IN ('line_channel_id', 'line_channel_secret', 'line_messaging_token', 'line_official_url');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 28JPo3Vw26mPY6V.root --database XBhqXuJ2WiY8ShtDj5vvMz --execute SELECT configKey, IFNULL(configValue, '(NULL)') AS val FROM site_config WHERE configKey IN ('line_channel_id', 'line_channel_secret', 'line_messaging_token', 'line_official_url');
